content:
Hi! Tyr has both an upstream and downstream version.

Downstream:
The development branch is tyr-dev. To discuss downstream work open an MR against tyr-dev.

Upstream:
To discuss work that can go directly upstream, open an MR against tyr-for-upstream
Any MRs opened on tyr-for-upstream should also apply to drm-rust-next

@Daniel Almeida

also documenting this in the Tyr page in rust-for-linux.com
https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/rust-for-linux.com/pull/52/files
@Daniel Almeida is you are ok with this, would you mind ack'ing the MR to change the rust-for-linux.com documentation please https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/rust-for-linux.com/pull/52
Deborah Brouwer has marked this topic as resolved.
